projectDescription: A hands-off daily agent loop that grows your Shopify store's Share of Model — how often AI shopping agents recommend and accurately describe your products — by continuously optimizing product pages, structured data, a Shopify Knowledge Base, and a Mintlify docs site.
keyFeatures: Daily autonomous agent loop running in Claude
Shopify Knowledge Base Q&A metaobject generation (20–30 per day)
AI-optimized product description (PDP) rewrites with reversible markers
JSON-LD structured data (Product, Offer, FAQPage) generation and staging
Mintlify docs article drafting (2–4 new + 2–3 refreshed pages per run)
ShopifyQL analytics to select the daily focus product
Share of Model tracking via Agentic Storefronts panel
Never-fabricate guardrails for compliance and AI citation quality
Human-gated git workflow — agent never commits or pushes
publicApiSurface: <!-- AEO:START/END --> HTML markers in product descriptionHtml
data.mdx Product Facts page per product (docs repo)
